raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to request further review and assistance regarding my ongoing dispute with Citi, documented under CFPB XXXX # XXXX. Despite my efforts to resolve the matter directly with Citi and the merchant, a fair resolution has not been achieved. 

The dispute involves a charge of {$1000.00} from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. Citi issued a partial credit of {$340.00} on XX/XX/XXXX, leaving a remaining balance of {$700.00}, which I continue to dispute. 

Key Issues : XXXX. Failure to Act on Reopen Request : I formally requested Citi to reopen the dispute on XX/XX/XXXX, due to the merchants unfair handling of the return. While Citi confirmed that a request was sent to the merchant, the dispute has remained pending without resolution since then. 
2. Lack of Full Refund for a Defective Product : The item purchased was defective, and the merchant charged a 20 % restocking fee that was not disclosed prior to purchase. Despite providing documentation, Citi has refused to issue a full refund or take further action.

3. Merchants Refusal to Negotiate : Efforts to resolve the matter directly with the merchant have been unsuccessful, as they have refused to negotiate or provide a full refund.

4. Citis Failure to Protect Consumer Rights : Citi has denied my request to reopen the dispute for the remaining {$700.00}, citing the merchants refusal to issue further credits. I believe Citi has not thoroughly protected my consumer rights under Regulation Z of the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ), which allows disputes for defective products or services not delivered as promised.

Arizona Consumer Protection : Under the Arizona Consumer Fraud Act ( ACFA ), consumers are protected against deceptive practices in the sale of merchandise. The act prohibits misrepresentations and concealment of material information in connection with the sale of merchandise. The merchants failure to disclose the restocking fee and refusal to provide a full refund for a defective product may constitute violations of the ACFA.

Financial Hardship : As a single mother struggling to make ends meet, the burden of paying an additional {$700.00} for a product I no longer have is extremely heavy. This unresolved charge has caused significant financial strain, and I am requesting urgent assistance to resolve the matter fairly.
